This is a testharness.js-based test.
Harness Error. harness_status.status = 1 , harness_status.message = Uncaught Error: assert_true: Window load event should fire before loadstart for lazy video in viewport expected true got false
[TIMEOUT] In-viewport video with loading='lazy' fires window load before loadstart
  Test timed out
Harness: the test ran to completion.
